name: 1799 Prime Steak & Seafood

notes: This ledger row represents the same Alexandria restaurant/domain as the preceding OSM-derived record but has a broader source profile that explicitly includes the cocktail menu.
Every frozen row was reconciled against the current July 2026 dinner menu and June 2026 cocktail menu.
The corrected represented surface contains 68 food items, 18 nonalcoholic beverages, and 12 current cocktails, with all beverage categories after food and dessert.
Direct contains signals come only from official item names/descriptions; cocktail descriptions are partial and silence remains unavailable.
The dinner menu GF warning is preserved as mayContain gluten on GF rows rather than a negative claim.
Lena Marie is current but its official description provides no supported major-allergen signal, so it remains accurately unavailable.
The frozen row set used an older dinner menu, included navigation/dress-code/composite artifacts, and produced 22 incorrect or incomplete allergen rows among current matches.
The broader corrected snapshot retains the current cocktail source instead of discarding the one cocktail row present in this record.

findings.summary: This row and osm-1799-prime-204629784 represent the same 1799 Prime Alexandria restaurant under different IDs and source scopes.
findings.resolution: Audited this frozen row independently and preserved its broader cocktail-menu scope; no ledger rows were deleted or merged.

findings.summary: Seventeen of 53 frozen rows were stale dishes or non-items, including navigation, dress-code text, protein modifiers, and collapsed side groups.
findings.resolution: Replaced the stale output with 98 current rows spanning food, nonalcoholic beverages, and the current cocktail menu.

findings.summary: Twenty-two of 36 surviving baseline rows had incorrect contains, may-contain, or source semantics.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt signals from current item text, removed adjacent-row bleed, and kept undisclosed rows unavailable.

findings.summary: The baseline omitted the official warning that GF foods may contact gluten in the shared kitchen.
findings.resolution: Mapped the warning to mayContain gluten on all covered GF rows without converting GF into a safety guarantee.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 98-item current snapshot for the broader duplicate record, including current cocktails and explicit GF cross-contact semantics.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/1799-prime-broader-repair-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 98 rows, 51 direct disclosures, 16 cross-contact-only rows, 31 unavailable rows, and zero known artifacts)

notes: The dinner PDF pages 4-9 and the cocktail PDF were rendered and visually reviewed before catalog construction.
